synthetic.banner: All data shown is synthetic — not real patient data.

landing.eyebrow: Your health, in one calm place
landing.title: Understand your health, your way
landing.subtitle: View your lab results in plain language, track your vitals, message your care team, and securely share your data — all in one friendly, private portal.
landing.feature1Body: We explain what each lab test measures and what your numbers mean — no medical degree required.
landing.feature2Body: See how your heart rate, blood pressure, weight and oxygen change over time with clear charts.
landing.feature3Body: Create time-limited, scope-limited links to share exactly the data you choose — and revoke them anytime.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your health portal.
login.demoHint: Demo: any email and password will work.
login.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

register.title: Create your account
register.otpBody: We sent a 6-digit code to your phone. Enter it below.
register.successBody: Your account has been created. You can now sign in to your portal.

errors.dob: Please enter a valid date of birth.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.phone: Please enter a valid mobile number.
errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.otpWrong: That code doesn't match. Please try again.

results.title: Lab results
results.subtitle: Grouped by panel. Select a result to see a plain-language explanation.
results.empty: No lab results are available yet.
results.interpretationLow: Your result is below the typical range.
results.interpretationNormal: Your result is within the typical range.
results.interpretationHigh: Your result is above the typical range.
results.disclaimer: Explanations are general and educational. Always discuss your results with your care team.

vitals.title: Vitals trends
vitals.subtitle: How your measurements change over time.
vitals.empty: No vital sign measurements are available yet.
vitals.chartSummary: Line chart of {metric} over time. Latest value {latest} {unit}.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Securely message your care team.
messages.empty: No messages yet. Start a conversation below.

share.title: Share your data
share.subtitle: Create a secure, time-limited link to share only the data you choose.
share.scopeError: Select at least one type of data to share.
share.activeEmpty: You have no active share links.
share.maxExpiry: For your safety, links can last at most 72 hours.

errors.title: We hit a snag
errors.body: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.
errors.notFoundBody: We couldn't find the page you were looking for.
